title: Bitter Crunchy Festive Ethiopian Sage Stir-fry
description: This Mediterranean-inspired dish marries bitter greens with crunchy elements for a festive twist on traditional Ethiopian cuisine.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons chopped fresh sage
ingredients.notes: can substitute with dried if fresh unavailable

instructions: Wash and chop kale into bite-sized pieces. Place in a large bowl.
Juice one lemon and add to the chopped kale with minced garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper, and balsamic vinegar (if using). Mix well to coat all kale evenly.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sage leaves and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Add the marinated kale into the hot pan, tossing gently to combine with the aromatic sage leaves. Cook for another minute until kale is just wilted but still has a crunch.
Serve immediately while fresh and crunchy.
